text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm designing Maruzensky's new training plan for
the new year, when...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Happy New Year! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Happy New Year! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I thought there was a chance you might be here,
and lo and behold, here you are!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're certainly getting work started early this
year.
choice_data_list:
It's because I want you to have as much fun
running as possible!

It's because I want you to have as much fun
running as possible!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: "Have fun," huh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you're going all out for me, then I'll have
to work just as hard!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So? What do you have on the docket for me?
choice_data_list: I want to boost that lightning speed of yours!
I want to focus on physical conditioning!

I want to help you get better at other running
styles!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So? What do you have on the docket for me?
choice_data_list: I want to boost that lightning speed of yours!
I want to focus on physical conditioning!

I want to help you get better at other running
styles!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You want to see more of that high-octane running
of mine, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I bet running even faster than I do now would feel
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a deal, cockatiel! I'll focus on that during my
training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I thought you were going to make me do
some super hardcore training or something...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But I guess you can't train if you aren't healthy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll work on taking care of my health. I'll
have to make sure I don't overeat during New
Year's!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so impressed that you have your eye on
something other than speed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's totally important to broaden your skill set if
you're thinking about running in a variety of
races.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll try to be aware of that! Maybe I should
work on drifting...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the new year just began, but you're
already working so hard for my sake...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the new year just began, but you're
already working so hard for my sake...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've been working hard since New Year's too... for
the sake of all the adorable younger students!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Just watch, and you'll see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky lays out a tablecloth on the desk and
begins placing cups on top of it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Here I go... Watch this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! A tablecloth pull! The younger students are going to love this for sure!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be New Year's without the parlor
tricks, right?
choice_data_list:
Parlor tricks, huh? I remember when they used
to show those on TV! That sure brings back
memories...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? It does?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! You mean they don't do parlor tricks
on TV anymore? Even on New Year's?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Err... Well, I guess it doesn't matter if it's out of
date or not, as long as people enjoy it, right?
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus begins a new year with Maruzensky.
